remarks: Lovely sunny cottage with recent updates--separate and private, attached to main house, on a beautiful cul de sac in the heart of Westport. Private entry and large entry foyer suitable for study/office, large eat-in kitchen with stone countertops, stainless steel appliances, stairs to living room and separate bedroom with ample closet space, new bath and washer/dryer. Private garage, 1 spot only, guest parking is on street. Tenant pays credit check. Utilities are paid as additional flat fee of $150/month. Please note: This is a single occupancy unit.
